mapper.sql: select id, dealer_code, dealer_name, plate_code, plate_name_zh, plate_name_en, plate_name_ko, plate_name_pt, plate_name_vi, plate_name_tr, plate_name_tw, plate_name_ja, plate_name_hi,plate_name_th,plate_name_ru,plate_name_ar, game_id, game_code, game_name_zh, game_name_en, game_name_ko, game_name_pt, game_name_vi, game_name_tr, game_name_tw, game_name_ja, game_name_hi,game_name_th,game_name_ru,game_name_ar,game_type_code, order_no, up_order_no, up_pre_order_no, channel_id, channel_code, channel_name, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, user_id, tg_user_id, bet_amount, win, win_loss, code_amount, order_status, order_type, bet_info, bet_result, rebate, super_user_id, super_user_tg_id, super_rebate,channel_user_id,channel_rebate, rebate_status, remark, create_time, settle_time, settle_status from t_order_term

select id, dealer_code, dealer_name, plate_code, plate_name_zh, plate_name_en, plate_name_ko, plate_name_pt, plate_name_vi, plate_name_tr, plate_name_tw, plate_name_ja, plate_name_hi,plate_name_th,plate_name_ru, plate_name_ar, game_id, game_code, game_name_zh, game_name_en, game_name_ko, game_name_pt, game_name_vi, game_name_tr, game_name_tw, game_name_ja, game_name_hi,game_name_th,game_name_ru,game_name_ar,game_type_code, order_no, up_order_no, up_pre_order_no, channel_id, channel_code, channel_name, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, user_id, tg_user_id, bet_amount, win, win_loss, code_amount, order_status, order_type, bet_info, bet_result, rebate, super_user_id, super_user_tg_id, super_rebate,channel_user_id,channel_rebate, rebate_status, remark, create_time, settle_time, settle_status from t_order_term
mapper.select: SELECT id, dealer_code, dealer_name, plate_code, plate_name_zh, plate_name_en, plate_name_ko, plate_name_pt, plate_name_vi, plate_name_tr, plate_name_tw, plate_name_ja, plate_name_hi, plate_name_th, plate_name_ru, plate_name_ar, game_id, game_code, game_name_zh, game_name_en, game_name_ko, game_name_pt, game_name_vi, game_name_tr, game_name_tw, game_name_ja, game_name_hi, game_name_th, game_name_ru, game_name_ar, game_type_code, order_no, up_order_no, up_pre_order_no, channel_id, channel_code, channel_name, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, user_id, tg_user_id, bet_amount, win, win_loss, code_amount, order_status, order_type, bet_info, bet_result, rebate, super_user_id, super_user_tg_id, super_rebate, channel_user_id, channel_rebate, rebate_status, remark, create_time, settle_time, settle_status FROM t_order_term WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1;

SELECT id, dealer_code, dealer_name, plate_code, plate_name_zh, plate_name_en, plate_name_ko, plate_name_pt, plate_name_vi, plate_name_tr, plate_name_tw, plate_name_ja, plate_name_hi, plate_name_th, plate_name_ru, plate_name_ar, game_id, game_code, game_name_zh, game_name_en, game_name_ko, game_name_pt, game_name_vi, game_name_tr, game_name_tw, game_name_ja, game_name_hi, game_name_th, game_name_ru, game_name_ar, game_type_code, order_no, up_order_no, up_pre_order_no, channel_id, channel_code, channel_name, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, user_id, tg_user_id, bet_amount, win, win_loss, code_amount, order_status, order_type, bet_info, bet_result, rebate, super_user_id, super_user_tg_id, super_rebate, channel_user_id, channel_rebate, rebate_status, remark, create_time, settle_time, settle_status FROM t_order_term WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1;

select ifnull(sum(bet_amount),0) as betAmount, ifnull(sum(code_amount),0) as codeAmount, ifnull(sum(win),0) as settleAmount, ifnull(sum(rebate),0) as rebate from t_order_term where user_id =#{userId} and create_time >= #{startTime} and create_time <= #{endTime} and order_type in (0,1)
select ifnull(sum(bet_amount), 0.0000) as betAmount ,COUNT(1) as count from t_order_term where settle_status = 0 and order_type in (0,1)
SELECT * FROM t_order_term WHERE create_time < #{startTime} AND settle_time < #{settleTime} AND settle_status = 1

select ifnull(sum(bet_amount), 0.0000) as betAmount ,COUNT(1) as count from t_order_term where settle_status = 0 and order_type in (0,1) and user_id in
#{userId}
select ifnull(sum(bet_amount), 0.0000) as betAmount ,COUNT(1) as count from t_order_term where settle_status = 0 and order_type in (0,1) and channel_id = #{channelId}
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(id), 0) AS max_id FROM t_order_term;
mapper.delete: -- 删除逻辑：每次最多删除 1000 条已结算且超过 2 小时的数据,体育类的 DELETE FROM t_order_term WHERE settle_status = 1 AND game_type_code in ('2') AND settle_time <= NOW() - INTERVAL 72 HOUR AND id <= #{maxId} LIMIT 1000;
-- 删除逻辑：每次最多删除 1000 条已结算且超过 2 小时的数据,体育类的 DELETE FROM t_order_term WHERE settle_status = 1 AND game_type_code NOT IN ('2') AND settle_time <= NOW() - INTERVAL 72 HOUR AND id <= #{maxId} LIMIT 1000;
